The question is asking to determine the number of clerks who began their service before the year 1959. Since each row represents an individual clerk and the "started" column indicates the year they began service, we need to group by the "started" column to check which clerks started before 1959. We can use the f_group_column(started) operation to group the clerks based on their starting year to analyze this situation.

The question is asking to determine the number of clerks who started their positions before the year 1959. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "started" column, which is a DateType, in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(started) operation. This will allow us to see the clerks who started their positions in the earliest years and count how many of them began before 1959.

Explanation: The clerks Kenneth W. Dam and Alan C. Kohn started in 1957, and William C. Canby, Jr. and Heywood H. Davis started in 1958. All of these years are before 1959. Therefore, the total number of clerks who started before 1959 is 4.
